zh.Bridgewater, Plymouth Co, MA, USA: 美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯布利其沃特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Timothy Washburn於大約1694年出生在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯布利其沃特時，他的父親Thomas Washburn48歲，母親Deliverance Packard43歲。他於大約1720年與Hannah在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯布利其沃特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1741年7月19日之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Timothy Washburn于大约1694年出生在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯布利其沃特时，他的父亲Thomas Washburn48岁，母亲Deliverance Packard43岁。他于大约1720年与Hannah在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯布利其沃特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1741年7月19日之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Washburn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: Timothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form, used in the Authorized Version of the Bible (alongside the Latin form Timotheus), of the Greek name Timotheos, from timē ‘honour’ + theos ‘god’. This was the name of a companion of St Paul; according to tradition, he was stoned to death for denouncing the worship of Diana . It was not used in England before the Reformation but has been in steady use since the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Timothy Washburn was born about 1694, in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States, his father, Thomas Washburn, was 48 and his mother, Deliverance Packard, was 43. He married Hannah about 1720, in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died after 19 July 1741, in his hometown.

de.lifeSummary: Als Timothy Washburn um 1694 in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Washburn 48 und seine Mutter Deliverance Packard 43. Er hat um 1720 in Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Hannah geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb nach 19. Juli 1741 in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Timothy Washburnが約1694年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスブリジェワターで生まれた時，父Thomas Washburnは48歳，母Deliverance Packardは43歳であった。約1720年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスブリジェワターでHannahと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1741年7月19日以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 브리지왓어

ko.lifeSummary: Timothy Washburn(이)가 대략 1694년 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 브리지왓어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Washburn(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Deliverance Packard(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1720년 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 브리지왓어에서 Hannah(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1741년 7월 19일 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Timothy Washburn nasceu aproximadamente 1694, em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Thomas Washburn, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Deliverance Packard, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah aproximadamente 1720, em Bridgewater, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu após 19 de julho de 1741, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Timothy Washburn родился около 1694 г. в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Thomas Washburn было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Deliverance Packard, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah около 1720 г. в местности бриджюэитир, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер после 19 июля 1741 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Timothy Washburn nació aproximadamente 1694, en Bridgewater, Plymouth, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, Thomas Washburn, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Deliverance Packard, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Hannah aproximadamente 1720, en Bridgewater, Plymouth, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió después de 19 de julio de 1741, en su pueblo.
